# Repository instructions

Read and follow [`../CLAUDE.md`](../CLAUDE.md) for repository architecture and
workflow rules. For every component or styling change, also read and apply
[`../docs/design-language.md`](../docs/design-language.md).

The design contract is binding: use shared tokens with exact fallbacks,
0.25rem-scale layout spacing, complete interaction/accessibility states,
reduced-motion behavior, alphabetical playground sections, targeted inner-loop
tests, and one final full validation gate.
